text:
also called is a fictional character from Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd game.

Profile

Master of Big Apple Diner in Shin Kichijoji, a restaurant that is quite popular, that even Misato comes to lunch there. Evangelion Chronicle D28 p.31 . His real surname is Tokunaga. He doesn't have much of a business sense, and often walks around town pretending that he's neglected his shop. He is a good-natured old man with a good sense of humor. 新吉祥寺にあるビッグ アップル ダイナーのマ スター。 本姓は徳永さん。 商売気が薄く、 店をほった らかしにしてよく街中を散 歩している。 ユーモアのあ る気さくなおじさん。 

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden

He is seen in the fourth ending added in the Special Edition version, serving various cups to the distraught Shinji after he believes that he couldn't save Mana Kirishima.

Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd

Trivia

He is voiced by Fumihiko Tachiki, the same voice actor who also voices Gendo Ikari.
